scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @docella/frontend" "npm run dev -w @docella/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @docella/schemas && npm run build -w @docella/backend && npm run build -w @docella/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @docella/schemas && npm run typecheck -w @docella/backend && npm run typecheck -w @docella/frontend
scripts.verify:release: npm run build && npm run verify:build -w @docella/frontend && npm run smoke:production -w @docella/backend
